# Vootely

> Vootely is Ghana's all-in-one platform for paid competitions, secure organizational elections, and event ticketing. Supports web-based Paystack checkout and offline USSD voting (*928*419#) with real-time leaderboards and wallet-based organizer payouts.

## Core Features

- **Paid Voting Campaigns**: Organizations, associations, and student bodies host public contests where supporters buy votes via Paystack (MoMo, Visa/Mastercard). Votes count only after payment confirmation.
- **Secure Organizational Elections**: Structured ballots with voter roster locking, credential-based one-time access tokens, encrypted secret ballots, and automated tallying. Supports positions, candidates, and results visibility controls.
- **Event Ticketing**: Custom ticket tiers (VIP, Regular, Early Bird, Table), instant MoMo/card payments, barcode ticket delivery via SMS/Email, and wallet-based revenue tracking.
- **Gate Check-In App**: Browser-based scanner (no app download). Verifies tickets via barcode scan, works offline with auto-sync, and auto-revokes usher passes after events.
- **USSD Offline Voting**: Shared shortcode *920*24# for all events. Voters dial from any phone (no internet), enter nominee code + quantity, complete via MoMo STK push. Synced instantly with web leaderboards.
- **Real-Time Leaderboards**: Public leaderboards update instantly on both web and USSD votes via HTMX polling.
- **Discounted Vote Bundles**: Custom bulk vote packages (e.g. 50 votes for GH₵40) to increase per-nominee revenue.
- **Organizer Dashboard**: KPI stats, CSV exports, revenue analytics, withdrawal requests, and event management.
- **Ledger-Backed Wallets**: Every vote payment credited to organizer wallet. Withdrawals processed to bank or MoMo.

## Dynamic Paths

- **Landing Page**: `{{ request.scheme }}://{{ request.get_host }}/` - Hero, live events carousel, features, USSD showcase, how-it-works, election support, FAQ, client reviews, blog preview, contact form, WhatsApp CTA.
- **Browse Events**: `{{ request.scheme }}://{{ request.get_host }}/events/` - Filterable grid of active/upcoming/ended paid competitions and ticketed events.
- **Event Detail**: `{{ request.scheme }}://{{ request.get_host }}/events/<slug>/` - Public microsite with event info, nominees, leaderboard, and purchase flow.
- **Nominee Detail**: `{{ request.scheme }}://{{ request.get_host }}/events/<slug>/nominees/<ref>/` - Individual nominee profile with photo, bio, vote codes, and direct voting path.
- **Public Nomination**: `{{ request.scheme }}://{{ request.get_host }}/events/<slug>/nominate/` - Allow supporters to submit nominee entries for review.
- **Election Detail**: `{{ request.scheme }}://{{ request.get_host }}/elections/<slug>/` - Public election overview with positions, candidates, and results (visibility depends on config).
- **Election Vote**: `{{ request.scheme }}://{{ request.get_host }}/elections/<slug>/vote/` - Ballot casting page accessible via credential tokens.
- **Election Results**: `{{ request.scheme }}://{{ request.get_host }}/elections/<slug>/results/` - Live or final election tallies.
- **Ticket Detail**: `{{ request.scheme }}://{{ request.get_host }}/tickets/<code>/` - Public ticket page with barcode, event info, and transfer options.
- **Ticket Purchase**: `{{ request.scheme }}://{{ request.get_host }}/tickets/<code>/` - Checkout and purchase flow.
- **Blog Listing**: `{{ request.scheme }}://{{ request.get_host }}/blog/` - Guides on running contests, offline voting, secure elections, ticketing, and competitor comparisons (Vootely vs Veetickets, Egotickets, Ayatickets).
- **Blog Article Detail**: `{{ request.scheme }}://{{ request.get_host }}/blog/<slug>/` - Individual articles with table of contents, recommended reads, and CTAs.
- **Contact**: `{{ request.scheme }}://{{ request.get_host }}/contact/` - Inquiry form for organizers planning competitions, elections, or events.
- **Sitemap Index**: `{{ request.scheme }}://{{ request.get_host }}/sitemap.xml` - XML sitemap covering static pages, paid competitions, ticketed events, secure elections, nominee pages, and blog posts.
- **Robots**: `{{ request.scheme }}://{{ request.get_host }}/robots.txt` - Crawl directives (disallows /admin/, /dashboard/, /accounts/).
- **Service Worker**: `{{ request.scheme }}://{{ request.get_host }}/service-worker.js` - PWA offline caching and install prompt.
- **Manifest**: `{{ request.scheme }}://{{ request.get_host }}/manifest.json` - PWA install configuration.

## Legal & Compliance

- **Privacy Policy**: `{{ request.scheme }}://{{ request.get_host }}/privacy/` - Data governance and storage policies compliant with Ghana Data Protection Act.
- **Terms of Service**: `{{ request.scheme }}://{{ request.get_host }}/terms/` - User terms and acceptable use.
- **Organizer Agreement**: `{{ request.scheme }}://{{ request.get_host }}/organizer-agreement/` - Platform fees, commission structures, payout rules, and merchant terms.
